title: The Island Moves Toward Open Conflict
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Narrator, Vander Decken, Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones. The core story beat is the island moves toward open conflict.
scene: The scene centers on the island moves toward open conflict, with Narrator, Vander Decken, Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! He threw the knife in a completely different direction...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but it landed straight in the octopus' back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: ...from the moment I touched you just now, you became my "target".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Any projectile I let fly, no matter what direction I throw it...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: ...will soar like a bird straight towards my target - you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The "Mato Mate curse"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Naturally, there are ways to block it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why don't you give it a try?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop!! All those arrows...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard rumours of that ability of yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: HORDY!! Decken's going to kill me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You have to stop him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I told you already, Hachi-san.

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Vander Decken isn't my subor- donate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of us are equals in this pirate alliance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And besides...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sick of having to look at your face!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You filthy coward!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ughh...!! Nyuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Off you goooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fly! Yummy yy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jaha Haha Haha AHA AHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Baha ohoho Hohoho How!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's beautiful!! Run!! Run all you like!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But no matter how far you go...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter where you run...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...they'll never stop chasing after you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're still coming...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ughhhh... even water doesn't slow them down?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kyun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaAR RRGHH H!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: chatter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bahoho hoho hoh...!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: I can store one target for each of my hands...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So, a maximum of two!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't even washed this right hand of mine for ten years...

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: It's still fresh with the memory of the time I touched Shirahoshii, Princess of the Ryugu kingdom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: You get it now?! Whether it be love or deadly weapons, whatever I choose to throw will chase my targets to the ends of the earth!!! This is my power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WOO OOW!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: So that's how he's managed to stalk her for all these years, without ever showing his face or being caught by the Neptunee army!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Baha hoho hoho how!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What an outrageously creepy guy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cree-py!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: ...Well then, my human pirate guests!! You all understand decken's ability now, do you not......?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That brings us... to the first stage of our plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Ryuguuau Palace is said to be imperetrable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But one man has succeeded in throwing many things inside its walls for ten long years...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: ...and that man is Vander Decken!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: In other words, you're going to be decken's new weapons... He's going to throw you all straight to where the mermaid Princess is hiding!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though where you'll actually end up is the walls of a formidable tower...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From there, you're to open the Palace gates from within, so we can begin our invasion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's crazy... if you throw us in there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We'll just crash into that wall and die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, yes.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: That's why I'm using the lives of you worthless humans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: In these waters, you're worth less than slaves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoever survives the journey is to carry out the mission!! If you succeed, then I will set you free!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you refuse, I'll hurl you outside this bubble myself right now, you filthy inferior beings!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehhhhhh?

summary: The Island Moves Toward Open Conflict. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
